meaning: n.等持,定,三昧(在印度教和佛教哲学用语)
examples: Samadhi is the only stable unchanging Reality.
They are powers in the worldly state, but they are obstacles to Samadhi.
Then come pratyahara, dahrana, dhyana and samadhi, which are the final four.
After all, he is the expert on Samadhi - the art of dying time and again.
Today, he is presiding over a Samadhi ceremony by Keiko Aikwa, a Japanese woman better known as Yogmata, and thousands of people are walking into his compound to watch it.
